holdings.infoBox: JSTC is an equity ETF with a total of 619 individual holdings. The top holdings are Lam Research stock at 1.68%, Visa Inc. at 1.27%, Cummins at 1.13%, ABB Ltd at 1.09%, and Samsung Electronics at 1.05%.

overview.description: The Adasina Social Justice All Cap Global ETF (JSTC) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is an actively managed fund of global companies screened for social justice criteria. JSTC was launched on Dec 10, 2020 and is issued by Tidal.
